heading: Permits: military reservations; landing ferries, erecting bridges, driving livestock
label: 9777 Permits: military reservations; landing ferries, erecting bridges, driving livestock
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)977710:1348., .July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 623 Stat. 104The words “may permit” are substituted for the words “shall have authority, in his discretion, to permit”. The words “to permit the extension of State, county, and Territorial roads across military reservations” are omitted as superseded by . In clause (3), the word “livestock” is substituted for the words “cattle, sheep or other stock animals”.section 2668 of this title
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)977710:1348., .July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 623 Stat. 104The words “may permit” are substituted for the words “shall have authority, in his discretion, to permit”. The words “to permit the extension of State, county, and Territorial roads across military reservations” are omitted as superseded by . In clause (3), the word “livestock” is substituted for the words “cattle, sheep or other stock animals”.section 2668 of this title

children.text: the landing of ferries at a military reservation;
the erection of bridges on a military reservation; and
the driving of livestock across a military reservation.
